title: Feature Extraction Pipeline in Computer Vision
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential stages of extracting meaningful features from a raw image for subsequent tasks like classification or object detection.
relationships: Raw Input Image is passed to Pre-processing for noise reduction and normalization
Pre-processed image is analyzed by a Feature Detector to find keypoints
A Feature Descriptor calculates a signature for each keypoint
Descriptors are compiled into a Feature Vector for machine learning models
